content:
📜 Why This Works:
✔ Forces factions to carefully plan their proposals and alliances.
✔ Prevents the game from stagnating due to reckless ritual attempts.
✔ Adds a layer of escalating tension and stakes to faction-based gameplay.

📌 FINAL LOCK-IN CONFIRMATION BEFORE MOVING ON

🔍 Are we missing anything critical?
✔ Have we covered archetypes, factions, fate mechanics, purges, rituals, class-wide events, debuffs, XP, transformations, and secret alignments?
✔ Are there any remaining loose ends before we shift focus?

🚀 If this is a full lock-in, we can now shift to refining any necessary documentation, tracking mechanics, or transitioning back to the core class structure.

📌 Version 9.4 – Locking in One-Time Purges & Scaling Faction Ritual Penalties
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 552 (chunk 552/555)
